case_title: CULTRONA, CHERYL A. VS CLOOS,DIANA PARTNER & IND ULTIMATE MATE INTERNAT.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CULTRONA, CHERYL A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLOOS,DIANA PARTNER & IND ULTIMATE MATE INTERNAT. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $49.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,049.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DIANA CLOOS - ULTIMATE MATE INTL RETURNED TO SENDER;
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLOOS,DIANA PARTNER & IND ULTIMATE MATE INTERNAT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,120.00 FILED BY CULTRONA, CHERYL A. AS TO DEFENDANT CLOOS,DIANA PARTNER & IND ULTIMATE MATE INTERNAT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
